must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field or compensating additional experience in lieu of degree, 3-7 years of experience in a DevOps or similar role, focusing on automation coding, system integration, and operations, Ability to work comfortably in a command line a Linux computing environment, Proficiency in scripting languages (Bash & Python) and use of APIs/SDKs, Proficiency in IaC languages (Pulumi, Terraform), Proficiency in CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, ArgoCD), Knowledge of containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS ECR/EKS), Strong knowledge of and good ability to work with source control systems (Git), Strong experience working in cloud-based environments (AWS), Strong experience in root cause analysis and resolution of operational issues
preferred_quals: Experience with ElasticSearch, ElasticSearch Agent & Kibana, Experience with setup and deployment of Kubernetes Dashboard, Experience with website certificate management, Experience with WireGuard VPN, Proficiency in Linux administration, networking and firewalls, Experience with security best practices and tools, Experience incorporating security compliance and best practices into DevOps automation workflows (e.g., DevSecOps), Professional certifications in cloud platforms, security, or DevOps technologies are highly desirable, Enthusiasm for learning new technologies, improving existing processes, and staying current with industry trends
core_responsibilities: Design, implement, and maintain robust, scalable infrastructure and automation solutions, Automate and optimize infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, deployment processes and operational repetitive tasks, Execute infrastructure and application deployments to upper cloud environments, Develop, maintain, optimize CI/CD pipelines and operational workflows, Monitor & optimize system performance & resource utilization and identify bottlenecks, Implement scalable and reliable systems that support product growth and team agility, Troubleshoot, determine root causes and resolve technical issues, Participate in code reviews and provide feedback on best practices, Collaborate cross-functionally with cloud, firmware, and hardware development teams to integrate and align solutions, Document operational processes, tools, and workflows to ensure knowledge sharing and smooth transitions
job_summary: Avive Solutions, Inc. is a VC-backed healthcare technology company focused on revolutionizing cardiac arrest response with their advanced Automated External Defibrillator (AED) and software platform. The Senior DevOps Engineer will play a key role in designing and maintaining cloud-based infrastructure to support the company's innovative products and ensure efficient deployment processes.
